name: Stericycle, Inc.
description: Stericycle, Inc. is a U.S.-based business-to-business services company and a leading provider of compliance-based solutions. The company specializes in regulated medical waste collection, disposal, and treatment, helping healthcare facilities manage hazardous materials safely. Additionally, Stericycle offers secure information destruction services through its Shred-it business, ensuring data privacy and regulatory compliance. By providing these essential services, Stericycle plays a critical role in protecting people and brands, promoting public health and well-being, and safeguarding the environment across its operations in the United States, Europe, and other international markets.
